# DWA

Local planner that samples admissible velocity commands inside a dynamic window and scores short rollouts.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Local Planning</span>
  <span>velocity sampling, mobile robots, local planner</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Read current state and goal] --> B[Compute dynamic window from velocity limits]
    B --> C[Sample candidate linear and angular velocities]
    C --> D[Forward simulate each trajectory]
    D --> E[Score heading, clearance, and speed]
    E --> F[Select best admissible command]
    F --> G[Send velocity command]
    G --> H{Goal reached?}
    H -- No --> A
    H -- Yes --> I[Stop]
```


## Notes

- DWA evaluates heading, clearance, and speed over short simulated trajectories.
- It is most effective when paired with a higher-level global planner.
